title: The Complete Sherlock Holmes
author: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle
rationale: The Complete Sherlock Holmes is the foundational text of modern crime fiction, establishing virtually every convention of the detective genre: the brilliant consulting detective, the loyal sidekick-narrator, forensic deduction, the locked-room puzzle, the arch-villain, and the serialized story format. No single work is more essential to understanding the mystery and crime fiction category.
